text.message: That’s the most Brian placement ever
I don't think a 6 has been rolled this game
Anyone want to give me wood?
Not an excuse. I did it to him earlier when he had no cards
No cards and I have robber
Coming your way it is then
Chris and Pat playing into Johns game. At least we are consistent for the year!
You not going against John doesn't make sense
I told you a while back I’m done doing that. There is no collective will so there is no point
You aren't trying to win for the year?
I am but going after John purely isnt the way because then you are left exposed to everyone else
Brian - i have a brick if you need
